text: Cash flow quality remained strong with Q4 operating cash flow of $52,402,000,000 and free cash flow of $24,551,000,000, translating to a free cash flow margin of 21.56%. The balance sheet exhibited solid liquidity with a current ratio of 2.01, supported by $206,038,000,000 in current assets against $102,745,000,000 in current liabilities. Leverage remained conservative with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.17 and net debt of $41,327,000,000 after accounting for cash and equivalents of $30,708,000,000.
